useErrorBoundary.description:
Convenience hook for imperatively showing or dismissing error boundaries.

⚠️ This hook must only be used within an `ErrorBoundary` subtree.

useListenerSize.description:
Enables real-time breakpoint listeners for responsive size changes.
When set to true, the component will listen for size changes and update responsively.
Note: Enabling this feature may have performance implications, especially
in complex or frequently updated components.

texts.type: { submit?: string | undefined; resend?: string | undefined; title?: string | undefined; contact?: ReactNode; resendText?: string | undefined; } | undefined
texts.defaultValue: { resend: 'Resend', resendText: 'Resend code', submit: 'Authorize and continue', title: 'We will send you a 6-digit code to your associated phone number so you can continue with your request.', contact: ( <> Problems with your digital token? Contact us {' '} Contact us ), }

  number: 'At least one number',

  especialChar: 'At least one of these special characters: ~!@#$^*-_=[]{}|;,.?',
  notMatch: 'The password confirmation and the new password do not match.',
}

className.description: Sets a className attribute on the outer component
